candidates.why: Beginning cash, not the balance-sheet stock variable.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Exact match to current portion of debt while explicitly excluding capitalized leases, which fits the STD baseline definition.
Cash flow movement, not a balance-sheet stock of short-term debt.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Chose a non-shortlist balance-sheet row because it is the cleanest exact match for short-term debt and explicitly excludes leases. Although recent preview values are blank, the label is semantically correct and should not be rejected for that reason.

candidates.why: Best available current tax payable/current tax liabilities line under current liabilities.
Deferred taxes are noncurrent and should not be used for taxes payable.
Asset, not taxes payable.
Asset, not taxes payable.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidates were provided. Selected 'Tax liabilities' as the best match for current taxes payable on the balance sheet; excluded deferred tax lines.

candidates.why: Best reported balance-sheet total for property, plant and equipment / tangible fixed assets; preferable to component gross/accumulated lines.
Appears to be a component/balancing line rather than total PPE.
Gross component only; less preferred than a total/net tangible fixed assets line.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Other - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease-related gross component, not baseline PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Contra-asset lease component, not PPE total.
Cash flow capex item, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Intangible Assets - excluding Goodwill - Net - Total
candidates.why: Intangible assets, not PPE.
Intangible assets, not PPE.
Intangible assets, not PPE.
